LightningComponentBundle.description: LWC view for showing information about s-kaupat.fi products by calling an Apex class for the product html and then scraping it.

property.name: eanCode
property.label: Product EAN Code
property.description: EAN code of the product. This will be used to fetch the product data from s-kaupat.fi.

property.name: imageWidth
property.label: Image Width
property.description: Maximum width in pixels that the image can take on the screen. This will also affect the size of the image fetched from the server.

property.name: imageHeight
property.label: Image Height
property.description: Maximum height in pixels that the image can take on the screen. This will also affect the size of the image fetched from the server.

property.name: detailsToShow
property.label: Details to Show
property.description: Comma separated tags of each type of item info to be shown. Dictates the order of the info except for the image and nutrients. Default value includes all possible tags.
property.default: Image, Nutrients, Name, Description, Price, Comparison Price, Ingredients, Storage Guide, Country of Origin, Brand Name, Contact Information, EAN Code

property.name: eanCode
property.label: Product EAN Code
property.description: EAN code of the product. This will be used to fetch the product data from s-kaupat.fi.

property.name: imageWidth
property.label: Image Width
property.description: Maximum width in pixels that the image can take on the screen. This will also affect the size of the image fetched from the server.

property.name: imageHeight
property.label: Image Height
property.description: Maximum height in pixels that the image can take on the screen. This will also affect the size of the image fetched from the server.

property.name: detailsToShow
property.label: Details to Show
property.description: Comma separated tags of each type of item info to be shown. Dictates the order of the info except for the image and nutrients. Default value includes all possible tags.
property.default: Image, Nutrients, Name, Description, Price, Comparison Price, Ingredients, Storage Guide, Country of Origin, Brand Name, Contact Information, EAN Code
